zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg於1095年出生在德國海因里希_霍恩左勒奧拉赤 賀辛根維辛根時，他的父親Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern35歲，母親Udalhild von Urach23歲。他與Itha von Schala結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1145年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg was born in 1095, in Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Prussia, Germany, his father, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, was 35 and his mother, Udalhild von Urach, was 23. He married Itha von Schala. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1145, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg est né en 1095, à Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Udalhild von Urach, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Itha von Schala. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1145, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg 1095 in Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern 35 und seine Mutter Udalhild von Urach 23. Er hat Itha von Schala geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1145 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg è nato il nel 1095 nel Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Udalhild von Urach, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Itha von Schala. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1145, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.Zollern, Wessingen, Hohaenzollern, Pruss: 독일 플레우ss 호헨졸레른 오베램트 헤친겐 웨징
ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg(이)가 1095년 독일 플레우ss 호헨졸레른 오베램트 헤친겐 웨징에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Udalhild von Urach(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Itha von Schala(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1145년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg nasceu em 1095, em Wessingen, Oberamt Hechingen, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Udalhild von Urach, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Itha von Schala. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1145, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.Zollern, Wessingen, Hohaenzollern, Pruss: вессинген, обирамт хечинген, хохензоллирн, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich von Zollern-Hohenzollern Count of Zollern and Hohenberg родился в 1095 г. в местности вессинген, обирамт хечинген, хохензоллирн, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Friedrich l. Graf von Zollern было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Udalhild von Urach, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Itha von Schala. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1145 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

Graf von Zollern, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Udalhild von Urach, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Itha von Schala. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1145, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
